title: Cronos Group (CRON) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Cronos Group Q3 2024 earnings call transcript. Consolidated net revenue reached record $34.3 million, up 38% year-over-year, surpassing analyst estimates. Net revenue excluding GrowCo was $30 million, representing 21% stand-alone growth. GrowCo contributed $4.3 million. Gross margin was 11%, with adjusted gross margin of 31%. Adjusted EBITDA improved by $9.2 million year-over-year. Spinach became number one ranked cannabis brand in Canada with 4.8% market share. Company obtained majority control of GrowCo board and began consolidating GrowCo results. Additional $51 million credit facility announced for GrowCo expansion. Management guided toward completion of expanded facilities in Q2 2025, with first harvests commencing in second half 2025. This expansion expected to drive significant volume and margin improvements. Strong execution on cost reduction while maintaining quality and innovation.
